text:
return
            _rawERC7579Validation(msg.sender, userOpHash, userOp.signature)
                ? ERC4337Utils.SIG_VALIDATION_SUCCESS
                : ERC4337Utils.SIG_VALIDATION_FAILED;

return
            _rawERC7579Validation(msg.sender, hash, signature)
                ? IERC1271.isValidSignature.selector
                : bytes4(0xffffffff);

return
            msg.sender == address($._token) && operator == address(this)
                ? IERC1155Receiver.onERC1155Received.selector
                : bytes4(0);

return
            msg.sender == address($._token) && operator == address(this)
                ? IERC1155Receiver.onERC1155BatchReceived.selector
                : bytes4(0);

return
            (currentState == ProposalState.Queued &&
                block.timestamp >= proposalEta(proposalId) + $._timelock.GRACE_PERIOD())
                ? ProposalState.Expired
                : currentState;
